inputs.label: Panel Area
inputs.businessContext: Area of a single solar panel in square meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Area of a single solar panel in square meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir güneş panelinin metrekare cinsinden alanı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Fläche eines einzelnen Solarmoduls in Quadratmetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface d'un seul panneau solaire en mètres carrés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Área de un panel solar individual en metros cuadrados.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مساحة اللوح الشمسي الواحد بالمتر المربع.

inputs.label: Panel Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Conversion efficiency of the solar panel under standard test conditions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Conversion efficiency of the solar panel under standard test conditions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart test koşullarında güneş panelinin dönüşüm verimliliği.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement de conversion du panneau solaire dans des conditions de test standard.
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia de conversión del panel solar en condiciones de prueba estándar.
businessContext_i18n.ar: كفاءة تحويل اللوح الشمسي تحت ظروف الاختبار القياسية.

inputs.label: Solar Irradiance
inputs.businessContext: Standard test condition irradiance, typically 1000 W/m².

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard test condition irradiance, typically 1000 W/m².
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart test koşulu ışınımı, tipik olarak 1000 W/m².
businessContext_i18n.fr: Irradiance standard de test, typiquement 1000 W/m².
businessContext_i18n.es: Irradiancia en condiciones de prueba estándar, típicamente 1000 W/m².
businessContext_i18n.ar: الإشعاع في ظروف الاختبار القياسية، عادة 1000 واط/م².

inputs.label: System Losses
inputs.businessContext: Total system losses including wiring, inverter, soiling, and mismatch.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total system losses including wiring, inverter, soiling, and mismatch.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kablolama, invertör, kirlenme ve uyumsuzluk dahil toplam sistem kayıpları.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtsystemverluste einschließlich Verkabelung, Wechselrichter, Verschmutzung und Fehlanpassung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pertes totales du système incluant câblage, onduleur, salissure et désadaptation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Pérdidas totales del sistema, incluyendo cableado, inversor, suciedad y desajuste.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي خسائر النظام بما في ذلك الأسلاك والعاكس والاتساخ وعدم التطابق.

inputs.label: Tilt Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angle of the panel relative to horizontal plane.

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle of the panel relative to horizontal plane.
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkel des Moduls relativ zur horizontalen Ebene.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle du panneau par rapport au plan horizontal.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo del panel respecto al plano horizontal.

inputs.label: Azimuth Angle
inputs.businessContext: Compass direction the panel faces (0 = south in northern hemisphere).

businessContext_i18n.en: Compass direction the panel faces (0 = south in northern hemisphere).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Panelin baktığı pusula yönü (kuzey yarımkürede 0 = güney).
businessContext_i18n.de: Himmelsrichtung, in die das Modul zeigt (0 = Süden auf der Nordhalbkugel).
businessContext_i18n.es: Dirección de la brújula que enfrenta el panel (0 = sur en el hemisferio norte).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الاتجاه الذي يواجهه اللوح (0 = الجنوب في نصف الكرة الشمالي).

inputs.label: Latitude
inputs.businessContext: Latitude of the installation site, positive for northern hemisphere.

businessContext_i18n.en: Latitude of the installation site, positive for northern hemisphere.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kurulum sahasının enlemi, kuzey yarımküre için pozitif.
businessContext_i18n.de: Breitengrad des Installationsorts, positiv für die Nordhalbkugel.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Latitude du site d'installation, positive pour l'hémisphère nord.
businessContext_i18n.es: Latitud del lugar de instalación, positiva para el hemisferio norte.
businessContext_i18n.ar: خط العرض لموقع التركيب، موجب لنصف الكرة الشمالي.

inputs.label: Annual Sun Hours
inputs.businessContext: Total equivalent full-sun hours per year at the location.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total equivalent full-sun hours per year at the location.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Konumda yıllık toplam eşdeğer tam güneş saati.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte äquivalente Volllaststunden pro Jahr am Standort.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'heures équivalent plein soleil par an à l'emplacement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Total de horas equivalentes de sol pleno por año en la ubicación.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي ساعات الشمس المكافئة الكاملة سنويًا في الموقع.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
